headline: Prudential (NYSE:PRU) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Financial services giant Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.6% year on year to $15.23 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.61 per share was 16% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on Prudential Financial, Lowers Price Target to $93
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Wesley Carmichael   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $95 to $93.
